name: Venetian Rice and Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, sauté onions in butter until golden brown.
2. Add peas and salt; cook for two minutes, stirring often.
3. Pour in broth.
4. Bring to a boil, then add rice, stirring thoroughly.
5. Simmer for an additional 25 minutes, or until rice is tender.
6. Stir in parsley. Remove from heat.
7. Stir in Parmesan cheese just before serving.
